home.title: AutoPulse Auction Ecosystem
home.subtitle: Scalable React architecture for real-time vehicle management.

tabs.sportsAuctionsDesc: Explore active bids for verified sports vehicles on AutoPulse.
tabs.lastPurchasesDesc: Access the chronological record of your previous bids and awarded vehicles.
tabs.portalTermsDesc: Bids on AutoPulse are binding. Read the warranty clauses carefully.

rules.rule1: Each bid increases the minimum price established.
rules.rule2: Once placed, bids cannot be cancelled.
rules.rule3: The highest bidder at end of time wins the auction.

errors.unauthorized: You must be logged in to place a bid.
errors.forbidden: You do not have the required permissions to place a bid.
errors.higherPrice: The bid amount must be higher than the current price.
errors.closedOrExpired: Cannot place a bid on a closed or expired auction.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred while placing your bid.

virtualPanel.title: Virtualized Auction Panel
virtualPanel.subtitle: High-performance catalog optimized with DOM virtualization for rapid scrolling over thousands of records.

placeBid.title: Place a Bid
placeBid.errorLabel: Bid must be higher than the current bid

liveAuction.title: Live Auction
liveAuction.connectionError: Real-time connection error. Data might not be up to date.
liveAuction.errorGeneric: An error occurred while placing your bid.
liveAuction.numericWarning: Please enter a valid numeric value.

auctionDetail.notFoundDesc: Could not load the auction details from the backend.
auctionDetail.securityNoteDesc: DOMPurify has surgically removed the <script> tag, blocked the javascript scheme execution in the link href, and disarmed the image onerror payload. The UI displays the rich text layout safely.
auctionDetail.securityPortalDesc: This portal enforces strict X-Frame-Options: DENY to protect against Clickjacking attacks, and strict perimeter CSP to neutralize remote code injections.

userBids.loginRequiredDesc: You must log in to your account to view the record of your bids.
userBids.noBidsDesc: You haven't placed any bids yet. Explore active auctions to get started!
